items.name: quill
items.title: Quill Design System
items.description: Warm parchment surfaces, moss accents, Fraunces display type, and rich ink tones. A handcrafted theme for editorial and creative applications.
items.author: Craftwell (https://www.quilldesignsystem.com)

items.name: icon
items.title: Icon (Material Symbols)
items.description: The Quill icon component — Material Symbols Outlined at weight 200, bundled as a self-contained core set covering every icon the Quill blocks use.

items.name: activity-feed
items.title: Activity feed
items.description: Card with a vertical timeline of recent events, each with an avatar, action text, and timestamp.

meta.use_when: You need to show a chronological history of what happened — recent events with who, what, and when.

items.name: alerts
items.title: Alert stack
items.description: A vertical stack of informational, success, and destructive alerts with icons.

meta.use_when: You need to surface inline status messages of varying severity (info, success, destructive) within a page.

items.name: analytics-charts
items.title: Analytics charts
items.description: Dashboard pair of cards showing an area chart of audience growth and a bar chart of weekly sales.

meta.use_when: You need a dashboard view of trends over time — an area chart plus a bar chart on card surfaces.

items.name: announcement-banner
items.title: Announcement banners
items.description: Two dismissible announcement banners: an inline bordered page banner and a full-bleed primary-color variant.

meta.use_when: You need to announce something site-wide with a dismissible banner, either inline or full-bleed.

items.name: badge-on-card
items.title: Badges on card
items.description: Default, secondary, and destructive badges displayed on a card surface.

meta.use_when: You need to show status or category badges attached to a content card.

items.name: calendar-page
items.title: Calendar page
items.description: A studio schedule card pairing a single-date calendar with the selected day's session list.

meta.use_when: You need to pick a single date and show what's scheduled that day.

items.name: calendar-range
items.title: Calendar range picker
items.description: Stateful two-month range calendar in a card for booking a span of days, with clear and reserve actions.

meta.use_when: You need to book a span of days with a two-month range picker and confirm/clear actions.

items.name: chat
items.title: Chat panel
items.description: A messaging panel with a contact header, message bubbles, and a composer input.

meta.use_when: You need a one-on-one messaging panel with a contact header, bubbles, and a composer.

items.name: checkout
items.title: Checkout
items.description: Two-column checkout with payment method picker, card form, and an order summary sidebar.

meta.use_when: You need to collect payment and card details alongside an order summary.

items.name: command-palette
items.title: Command palette
items.description: A searchable command palette with grouped actions, recent items, and keyboard shortcuts.

meta.use_when: You need a searchable ⌘K launcher for actions and quick navigation.

items.name: contact-form
items.title: Contact form
items.description: A get-in-touch card with name, email, topic select, and message fields.

meta.use_when: You need a get-in-touch form with name, email, topic, and message fields.

items.name: cookie-consent
items.title: Cookie consent
items.description: A cookie consent banner with accept, reject, and preferences actions.

meta.use_when: You need a compliance banner offering accept, reject, and preferences choices.

items.name: dashboard
items.title: Dashboard shell
items.description: An app shell with sidebar navigation, a search header, and KPI stat cards.

meta.use_when: You need a full application home — sidebar, search header, and KPI cards.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data table
items.description: A members table with filter toolbar, status badges, and per-row actions.

meta.use_when: You need a filterable, actionable table of records with status badges and row actions.

items.name: empty-state
items.title: Empty state
items.description: A dashed-border empty state with an icon, explanatory text, and a primary action.

meta.use_when: You need to explain why a view is empty and offer the primary action to fill it.

items.name: error-404
items.title: 404 page
items.description: A full-page 404 error state with go-back and home actions.

meta.use_when: You need a full-page not-found state with recovery actions.

items.name: faq
items.title: FAQ section
items.description: Centered FAQ section with an accordion of common questions and a contact call-to-action footer.

meta.use_when: You need to answer common questions in an accordion with a contact fallback.

items.name: feature-section
items.title: Feature section
items.description: A marketing section with an editorial heading and a three-column feature grid.

meta.use_when: You need to present product features in an editorial multi-column grid.

items.name: file-upload
items.title: File upload
items.description: An asset upload card with a drag-and-drop dropzone and a progress-tracked upload queue.

meta.use_when: You need drag-and-drop asset upload with a progress-tracked queue.

items.name: footer
items.title: Site footer
items.description: A marketing footer with brand blurb, link columns, and legal links.

meta.use_when: You need a site-wide footer with link columns, a brand blurb, and legal links.

items.name: forgot-password
items.title: Forgot password
items.description: A password reset card with an email field, send-link action, and back-to-sign-in button.

meta.use_when: You need a password-reset request card that sends a recovery link.

items.name: hero
items.title: Hero
items.description: A centered marketing hero with a release badge, serif headline, supporting copy, and primary/secondary call-to-action buttons.

meta.use_when: You need the top-of-page marketing statement — headline, supporting copy, and calls to action.

items.name: invoice
items.title: Invoice
items.description: Invoice card with sender and recipient details, a line-item table with totals, and a download action.

meta.use_when: You need a printable invoice with parties, line-item totals, and a download action.

items.name: kanban
items.title: Kanban board
items.description: A three-column kanban board with card counts, tagged task cards, avatars, and an add-card affordance per column.

meta.use_when: You need to manage work across status columns with draggable, tagged task cards.

items.name: list-detail
items.title: List + detail
items.description: An inbox-style split view pairing a selectable message list with a detail pane that includes archive and delete actions.

meta.use_when: You need an inbox-style split view pairing a selectable list with a detail pane.

items.name: login
items.title: Login
items.description: A sign-in card with email and password fields, a remember-me checkbox, and primary and forgot-password actions.

meta.use_when: You need the standard email-and-password sign-in with remember-me and reset links.

items.name: login-minimal
items.title: Minimal login
items.description: Bare centered login form with a logo mark and a single email field for one-time-code sign-in.

meta.use_when: You need the leanest possible sign-in — a single field for one-time-code entry.

items.name: login-split-panel
items.title: Login with split panel
items.description: Full-page login with a brand testimonial side panel and an email/password form with a magic-link option.

meta.use_when: You need a branded full-page sign-in with a testimonial side panel and magic-link option.

items.name: mail-shell
items.title: Mail inbox shell
items.description: Two-pane mail client shell with a searchable message list and a reading pane with toolbar and inline reply.

meta.use_when: You need a two-pane mail client — searchable list plus a reading pane with toolbar and reply.

items.name: navbar
items.title: Navbar
items.description: A top navigation bar with brand wordmark, responsive link list, and sign-in plus get-started actions.

meta.use_when: You need a top navigation bar with wordmark, links, and sign-in / get-started actions.

items.name: theme-selector
items.title: Theme selector
items.description: A dropdown picker for the four Quill themes (Dawn, Dusk, Classic Light, Classic Dark) and the four pigment accents (terracotta, moss, indigo, gold) — sets data-theme/data-accent and persists both to localStorage.

meta.use_when: You need to let users switch among Quill's four themes and four accents, persisted to localStorage.

items.name: newsletter
items.title: Newsletter signup
items.description: A centered newsletter signup section with an email form and social proof.

meta.use_when: You need an email-capture section with social proof to grow a list.

items.name: notifications
items.title: Notifications
items.description: A notifications card listing recent events with icons, timestamps, unread indicators, and a mark-all-read action.

meta.use_when: You need a notifications center with unread indicators and a mark-all-read action.

items.name: onboarding
items.title: Onboarding checklist
items.description: A setup checklist card with a progress bar, completed and pending tasks, and start links for remaining steps.

meta.use_when: You need a setup checklist that tracks progress and links to remaining steps.

items.name: order-summary
items.title: Order summary
items.description: A checkout order summary card with line items, a promo code input, a total, and a pay-now button.

meta.use_when: You need a cart-review card with line items, a promo field, a total, and a pay button.

items.name: otp-verification
items.title: OTP verification
items.description: An email verification card with a six-digit one-time-passcode input and resend action.

meta.use_when: You need to verify an email with a six-digit one-time passcode and resend.

items.name: page-header
items.title: Page header
items.description: A page header with breadcrumb trail, title and description, and duplicate/new action buttons.

meta.use_when: You need a screen header with breadcrumbs, title, description, and primary actions.

items.name: pricing
items.title: Pricing
items.description: A three-tier pricing grid with a highlighted popular plan, feature checklists, and per-plan calls to action.

meta.use_when: You need a tiered pricing grid with a highlighted plan and feature checklists.

items.name: profile-card
items.title: Profile card
items.description: A centered profile card with avatar initials, role, follower stats, and follow and message actions.

meta.use_when: You need a compact user profile with avatar, role, stats, and follow / message actions.

items.name: search-results
items.title: Search results
items.description: A docs search panel with a query input, result count, and a linked result list showing breadcrumbs and type badges.

meta.use_when: You need a search panel with a query input, result count, and a linked result list.

items.name: settings
items.title: Settings form
items.description: A profile settings card with name fields, bio textarea, and an email notification toggle.

meta.use_when: You need a profile settings form with name, bio, and notification preferences.

items.name: sidebar-nav
items.title: Sidebar navigation shell
items.description: Collapsible icon sidebar app shell with grouped menus, badges, a breadcrumb header, and a card grid main area.

meta.use_when: You need a collapsible icon-sidebar app shell with grouped menus and a content area.

items.name: signup
items.title: Sign up
items.description: An account creation card with name, email, and password fields plus a sign-in link.

meta.use_when: You need standard account creation — name, email, password, and a sign-in link.

items.name: signup-social
items.title: Signup — social first
items.description: Signup card leading with GitHub and Google provider buttons, followed by an email and password fallback.

meta.use_when: You need signup that leads with OAuth providers and falls back to email/password.

items.name: stat-cards
items.title: Stat cards
items.description: A responsive grid of KPI cards showing values with delta badges versus last month.

meta.use_when: You need a row of KPI cards showing values with period-over-period deltas.

items.name: stats-band
items.title: Stats band
items.description: Marketing band of headline statistics separated by vertical dividers on a card background.

meta.use_when: You need a marketing band of headline statistics separated by dividers.

items.name: tabs-page
items.title: Tabs page
items.description: A tabbed settings page with account, notifications, and security panels.

meta.use_when: You need a settings screen split into account, notifications, and security tabs.

items.name: team-section
items.title: Team section
items.description: Marketing team grid with avatar cards showing each member's name, role, specialty badge, and email action.

meta.use_when: You need a marketing team grid with member cards, roles, and contact actions.

items.name: testimonial
items.title: Testimonial
items.description: A customer quote card with a serif pull-quote, avatar initials, and attribution.

meta.use_when: You need a customer-quote card with a serif pull-quote and attribution.

items.name: wizard
items.title: Setup wizard step
items.description: A multi-step wizard card with a progress stepper, workspace fields, and back/continue actions.

meta.use_when: You need a multi-step setup flow with a progress stepper and back/continue navigation.
